title: BackgroundService static _running is global mutable state
description: BackgroundService._running is a static class-level field. This means: (1) impossible to test BackgroundService in isolation — tests share state; (2) if flutter_driver, platform tests, or add-to-app scenarios create multiple FlutterEngine instances, the second engine inherits the first engine's _running state, potentially skipping stop() calls; (3) the 'no-op on non-Android' behavior is correct but the static flag could desync from actual Android service state if the process is killed and restarted. Pattern a well-intentioned contributor will copy when adding iOS BGProcessingTask equivalent. Suggest: pass BackgroundService as a constructor argument to RelayService so it can be injected/mocked in tests.
